# nullcloud_cluster (Resource)

Manages a NullCloud Kubernetes cluster.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "nullcloud_vpc" "example" {
  name = "my-vpc"
}

resource "nullcloud_subnet" "example" {
  name       = "my-subnet"
  vpc_id     = nullcloud_vpc.example.id
  zone       = "us-east-1"
  cidr_block = "10.0.0.0/24"
}

resource "nullcloud_cluster" "example" {
  name       = "my-cluster"
  version    = "1.30"
  node_count = 3
  subnet_ids = [nullcloud_subnet.example.id]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the Kubernetes cluster.
- `node_count` (Number) Number of worker nodes (minimum 1).
- `subnet_ids` (List of String) List of subnet IDs where cluster nodes will be deployed.
- `version` (String) Kubernetes version (e.g. 1.30).

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `crn` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `status` (String)
